channel.title: Codeopinion.com on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Codeopinion.com on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Solving the ‘God Object’ Problem with Shared Identity
item.description: You start with a simple entity. Then, over time, you add more and more properties. The next thing you know, you have a god object sitting at the center of your system. Everything touches it. Everything depends on it. Every workflow flows through it. And whenever you need to make a change, you hope it… Read More »Solving the ‘God Object’ Problem with Shared Identity The post Solving the ‘God Object’ Problem with Shared Identity appeared first on CodeOpinion.
